title: ずっと Zutto 輝いて Forever

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky invites me down to the hotel resort
for their soft opening event.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
This place is popping off! Let's do a
hundred-square human shogi contest! I'll be the
king, and you can be a charismatic beautician!
choice_data_list: W-well, we do have enough people for that!
W-well, we do have enough people for that!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
I heard they renovated the place, but I don't see
any changes.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky might be their ambassador, but this is
looking to be a letdown. Was she cajoled into the
role?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: H-hey! Maruzen isn't the type to—

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hi, everybody! And welcome to this off-the-road
paradise resort!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Without any further ado, I would like to present
the special new service we've concocted for the
hotel's renewal. We call it...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: The "Be a Noble for a Day" experience!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And so, we've prepared a personal butler for
every guest! ♪

text_block_list.name: Butler
text_block_list.text:
<username>, I will be
accompanying you for the day. Let me know if
you have any requests.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Let's start off with the spa! The steam will melt
away your built-up fatigue. ♪

text_block_list.name: Butler
text_block_list.text:
How do you find the water? Would you like any
refreshments?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, you just read my mind! Get me some oden
broth, and put some of those cold blocks in it so
the glass will go "cling cling"!

text_block_list.name: Butler
text_block_list.text: Understood. Coming right up.
choice_data_list: Wait, they've got that on the ready?!
Wait, they've got that on the ready?!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Well, this is nothing special. Any establishment
could provide the same service if they wanted to.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And now for some delicious afternoon tea! This
luxurious room will have you feeling like one of
the elites.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The absence of a tea stand makes this experience
feel quite authentic!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
And I do appreciate the attention to detail with
these matching tea cups and silverware!

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for the gracious compliment. In fact,
our establishment's teatime was once featured in
a novel written during the Taisho era.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! This place was mentioned in that
masterpiece?! Who knew I would ever get the
chance to experience the flavors described in that
text...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
All right, time for a photo shoot! Pick out your
dress of choice and accessories from this
wonderful closet!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wow, it's hard to choose when they all look so
great! I guess I could say a well-made dress
outshines even the softest paw!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
I get it. In our modern age, rarely do we get the
chance to dress in such formal wear, making this
experience all the more fresh... Um, how many
participants are allowed?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the Be a Noble for a Day experience
comes to an end.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And that's the last of it! I'll let the manager do the
closing honors!

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text:
I would like to thank everyone for coming. In
today's landscape of ever-changing trends, our
resort could appear outdated to some.

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text:
But I firmly believe that while the times may
change, people's hearts are unchanging.

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text:
What captures the heart is neither innovation nor
nostalgia. The important thing is...

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text:
Authenticity. It's about staying true to yourself
and honing your strengths.

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text:
That is what drives us to provide our vision of
quality service.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Believing in your heart, and striving to reach out
with it...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I hope that today's experience allowed you to
feel the great pride and passion each member of
this hotel's staff holds.

text_block_list.name: All the Staff
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for joining us today. We hope that
you'll choose us for your next trip!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
I have to say, that was marvelous! The staff's
passion and the history of this place really shines
through... My heart feels a little lighter, strangely
enough.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
I have to write a piece on this! I'll call it, "Historic
Hotel Sees a Grand Revival."

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text: Oh! Th-thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm readying myself to go home when I spot
Maruzensky down by the shore.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Whew... the breeze feels wonderful! I can never
get enough of this beach.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
The shoreline is long. It's tranquil... And today, it
somehow looks more radiant than usual.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'll trust in my heart when it beats with
excitement. However old or outdated the reason
may be.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
What matters most to me is what's trendy! Don't
you think? ♪
